title: Billiard ball
body: A billiard ball is a small, hard ball used in cue sports, such as carom billiards, pool, and snooker. The number, type, diameter, color, and pattern of the balls differ depending upon the specific game being played. Various particular ball properties such as hardness, friction coefficient, and resilience are important to accuracy.
categories: Articles with unsourced statements from February 2010
Pages using multiple image with auto scaled images
